requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General)
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Finnish/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. In Finland, Tukes (Finnish Safety and Chemicals Agency) is the LVD market surveillance authority.
summary.zh: 在芬兰/欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在芬兰，Tukes（芬兰安全与化学品局）是低压指令市场监管机构。
summary.zht: 在芬蘭/歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在芬蘭，Tukes（芬蘭安全與化學品局）是低壓指令市場監管機構。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and EU-language (Finnish/Swedish/English) technical instructions are all required. Finland-specific: cold-climate (-30°C or lower) operating range must be declared and verified for outdoor chargers.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：需提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及欧盟语言（芬兰语/瑞典语/英语）技术说明书。芬兰特定要求：须为户外充电设备声明并验证寒冷气候（−30°C或更低）工作范围。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：需提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及歐盟語言（芬蘭語/瑞典語/英語）技術說明書。芬蘭特定要求：須為戶外充電設備聲明並驗證寒冷氣候（−30°C或更低）工作範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before EU/Finnish market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements. Tukes enforces in Finland.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway; EU evidence against the LVD requirements is needed. Tukes is the Finnish market surveillance authority. Finnish-language or Swedish-language instructions may be required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径；仍需提供针对LVD要求的欧盟证据。Tukes是芬兰市场监管机构。可能需要提供芬兰语或瑞典语说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑；仍需提供針對LVD要求的歐盟證據。Tukes是芬蘭市場監管機構。可能需要提供芬蘭語或瑞典語說明書。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Finnish/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. For Finland, outdoor DC charging stations must be rated and verified for cold-climate operation down to at least -30°C (lower in northern Finland), with particular attention to enclosure heating, cold-start protocols, and condensation prevention.
summary.zh: 投放芬兰/欧盟市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。对于芬兰，户外直流充电站须通过额定认证并验证至少−30°C的寒冷气候工作（芬兰北部更低），特别注意外壳加热、冷启动程序和防冷凝措施。
summary.zht: 投放芬蘭/歐盟市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。對於芬蘭，戶外直流充電站須通過額定認證並驗證至少−30°C的寒冷氣候工作（芬蘭北部更低），特別注意外殼加熱、冷啟動程序和防冷凝措施。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station — the only published Part 3 of the 18487 series; note: a GB/T 18487.3-2015 does not exist). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (superseded by GB/T 20234.3-2023 which supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一发布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015并不存在）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（已被GB/T 20234.3-2023取代，新版支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一發布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015並不存在）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（已被GB/T 20234.3-2023取代，新版支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition; no 2015 revision exists)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Finland should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European grid topology; (3) CHAdeMO or CCS2 communication protocol compatibility; (4) Finland-specific: cold-climate operation rating to at least -30°C for outdoor Finnish installations, including enclosure heater sizing, cold-start DC output behaviour, and freeze-thaw seal integrity.
gap.zh: 出口芬兰的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异；（2）欧洲电网拓扑下的绝缘监控要求；（3）CHAdeMO或CCS2通信协议兼容性；（4）芬兰特定要求：芬兰户外安装须通过至少−30°C的寒冷气候工作额定认证，包括外壳加热器容量、冷启动直流输出行为和冻融密封完整性。
gap.zht: 出口芬蘭的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異；（2）歐洲電網拓撲下的絕緣監控要求；（3）CHAdeMO或CCS2通訊協議相容性；（4）芬蘭特定要求：芬蘭戶外安裝須通過至少−30°C的寒冷氣候工作額定認證，包括外殼加熱器容量、冷啟動直流輸出行為和凍融密封完整性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard that may support presumption of conformity where harmonised/cited; alternatives are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the Directive. Tukes enforces in Finland.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation, including LVD where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support where harmonised; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU CCS2 practice. Finland-specific: cold-climate rating to -30°C or lower is critical for outdoor Finnish installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在LVD范围内的产品须符合低压指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或在协调时用于推定符合性的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与欧盟CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。芬兰特定要求：最低至−30°C的寒冷气候额定认证对于芬兰户外安装至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在LVD範圍內的產品須符合低壓指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或在協調時用於推定符合性的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與歐盟CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬體差距。芬蘭特定要求：最低至−30°C的寒冷氣候額定認證對於芬蘭戶外安裝至關重要。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722) with Cold-Climate Considerations
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）及寒冷气候注意事项
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）及寒冷氣候注意事項

summary.en: EU member-state electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself, but exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements so they can be accepted by Finnish installers and DSOs. In Finland, SFS adopts IEC/CENELEC standards and Finnish building regulations (Maankäyttö- ja rakennusasetus) incorporate the relevant IEC installation requirements. Additionally, Finnish outdoor installations must address cold-climate wiring requirements, cable flexibility at low temperatures, and earthing system performance in permafrost or frost-heave conditions in northern Finland.
summary.zh: 欧盟成员国电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。这些标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身，但出口欧盟的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容，以便获得芬兰安装商及配电运营商接受。在芬兰，SFS采用IEC/CENELEC标准，芬兰建筑法规（Maankäyttö- ja rakennusasetus）纳入了相关IEC安装要求。此外，芬兰户外安装须解决低温布线要求、低温下线缆柔韧性，以及芬兰北部永久冻土或冻胀条件下接地系统性能问题。
summary.zht: 歐盟成員國電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。這些標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身，但出口歐盟的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容，以便獲得芬蘭安裝商及配電運營商接受。在芬蘭，SFS採用IEC/CENELEC標準，芬蘭建築法規（Maankäyttö- ja rakennusasetus）納入了相關IEC安裝要求。此外，芬蘭戶外安裝須解決低溫布線要求、低溫下線纜柔韌性，以及芬蘭北部永久凍土或凍脹條件下接地系統性能問題。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles

HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by EU member states) (confirmed: HD 60364-7-722:2018 is the current CENELEC harmonisation document, approved 27 August 2018; adopted in Finland as SFS-HD 60364-7-722)
Finnish building regulations (Maankäyttö- ja rakennusasetus) incorporating IEC installation requirements

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Finnish/EU member-state installation standards. China does not have specific cold-climate installation requirements comparable to Finnish conditions.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合芬兰/欧盟成员国安装标准的证据。中国没有与芬兰条件相当的特定寒冷气候安装要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合芬蘭/歐盟成員國安裝標準的證據。中國沒有與芬蘭條件相當的特定寒冷氣候安裝要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are installation standards — they govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under EU installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Finnish/EU electrical codes will fail field acceptance. Chinese charger datasheets often omit compatibility statements expected by Finnish installers. Finland-specific installation gaps: (1) cold-climate cable selection (rated for -40°C or colder for outdoor Finnish routes); (2) earthing system continuity in permafrost or frost-heave conditions in northern Finland; (3) SFS-adopted installation standards may impose additional requirements beyond the base HD 60364-7-722.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口欧盟的充电设备应依据欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在芬兰/欧盟电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含芬兰安装商所期望的兼容性声明。芬兰特定安装差距：（1）寒冷气候线缆选型（芬兰户外线路须额定至−40°C或更低）；（2）芬兰北部永久冻土或冻胀条件下的接地系统连续性；（3）SFS采用的安装标准可能在HD 60364-7-722基础上提出额外要求。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口歐盟的充電設備應依據歐盟安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在芬蘭/歐盟電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含芬蘭安裝商所期望的相容性聲明。芬蘭特定安裝差距：（1）寒冷氣候線纜選型（芬蘭戶外線路須額定至−40°C或更低）；（2）芬蘭北部永久凍土或凍脹條件下的接地系統連續性；（3）SFS採用的安裝標準可能在HD 60364-7-722基礎上提出額外要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Finnish/EU member-state electrical installation law and grid codes. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / SFS-adopted equivalents are voluntary or nationally adopted technical standards commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility is a practical market requirement. Finnish cold-climate installation requirements are a practical mandatory requirement for outdoor chargers.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD; no cold-climate equivalence for Finnish conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 govern building-side installation practice as adopted through Finnish national rules (SFS). EV chargers exported to Finland should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements expected by Finnish installers and DSOs. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility can block field installation. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Finland's extreme cold winters impose additional cold-climate cable, earthing, and installation requirements not present in Chinese domestic practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722通过芬兰国家规则（SFS）采纳后规范建筑侧安装实践。出口芬兰的充电设备应与芬兰安装商及配电运营商所期望的RCD和接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但不兼容会阻碍现场安装。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。芬兰极寒冬季对线缆、接地和安装提出了中国国内实践中不存在的额外寒冷气候要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722通過芬蘭國家規則（SFS）採納後規範建築側安裝實務。出口芬蘭的充電設備應與芬蘭安裝商及配電運營商所期望的RCD和接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但不相容會阻礙現場安裝。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。芬蘭極寒冬季對線纜、接地和安裝提出了中國國內實務中不存在的額外寒冷氣候要求。
